news.title: Overwatch 2 is Coming to Xbox Game Pass
news.summary: Link your eligible Xbox Game Pass account to your Battle.net account by November 11 to receive exclusive benefits!

news.title: Director’s Take – Juno, Clash, and a Look Ahead to Midseason
news.summary: With Midseason just around the corner, Alec Dawson takes a moment to review how much Juno and the new game mode Clash has impacted the game.

news.title: Complete Your Collection with the Overwatch League Inventory Sale
news.summary: It’s your last chance to complete your skin collection for your favorite teams and heroes from the Overwatch League collection.

news.title: Defense Matrix – Removing Cheaters from Overwatch 2
news.summary: Overwatch 2’s Defense Matrix update is here to provide news on our efforts to stop disruptive play in-game.

news.title: Director’s Take: Competitive Updates for Season 12
news.summary: System Designer Gavin Winter takes over the Director’s Take to share new updates coming to gameplay and Competitive in Season 12.

news.title: Embark on an Out of This World Voyage in Overwatch 2 - Season 12: New Frontiers
news.summary: Blast into action with the new Martian Support Hero Juno, a Mid-Year reset, Clash game mode featuring two new maps, and more.

news.title: Director's Take: Opening up the conversation on 5v5 and 6v6
news.summary: Let’s kick off the discussion on 6v6, why the team went to 5v5, and where we go from here.

news.title: Unleash Your Inner Demon with Reinhardt’s Mythic Weapon
news.summary: Explore how the Overwatch Development Team forged the Mythic Weapon Skin for Reinhardt, the Bound Demon Mythic Weapon Skin
